title: SCADA & Automation Engineer (PLC I Programming)
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $5000 - $7000 + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location : Tuas (Transport Provided)
  • Working days : Monday to Friday
  • Working hours : 8am to 5pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • Design and develop SCADA/HMI applications using AVEVA Wonderware System Platform and Wonderware InTouch for waste treatment and incineration plants.
  • Install and configure AVEVA System Platform components in a redundant environment, including ArchestrA IDE, Galaxy Repository, InTouch HMI, ArchestrA Object Server (AOS), Historian, Communication Drivers, System Management Console, and License Manager.
  • Configure real-time data acquisition, trending, alarms, reports, and historical data logging.
  • Configure and manage industrial communication protocols such as Modbus, OPC UA/DA, PROFINET, EtherNet/IP, MelsecNet, and others to ensure reliable real-time data exchange.
  • Establish seamless communication between SCADA systems and various field devices, including PLCs, RTUs, VFDs, sensors, Continuous Emissions Monitoring System and other field instruments.
  • Familiarity with PLCs programming software Control Expert, STEP 7 v5.x software and GX Developer, working with Schneider Modicon series PLCs (M340, M580), Siemens PLCs (S7-300, S7-400), and Mitsubishi MELSEC Q Series PLCs.
  • Familiar with key industrial software applications such as Continuous Emissions Monitoring System, KEPServerEX OPC Server, Dream Report, and WIN-911.
  • Perform system testing, troubleshooting, and debugging of both hardware and software components.
  • Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation (I/O lists, tag databases, wiring diagrams, SOPs).
  • Collaborate effectively with vendors, project engineers, automation and control engineers, process engineers and field technicians during system installation and commissioning.
  • Provide technical expertise and consultancy support during tendering and project development phases.
  • Ensure cybersecurity, data integrity, and overall system reliability.
  • Deliver remote or on-site technical support as needed.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, or Automation Engineering.
  • Minimum of 6 years hands-on experience in SCADA programming and industrial automation.
  • Proven experience with SCADA platforms such as AVEVA/Wonderware System Platform.
  • Familiarity with PLC systems from Schneider Electric and Siemens.

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

THIEN CHING MEI (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
